name: sunny
description: Project Sunny — AI therapeutic learning companion

scripts.build: npx tsx scripts/generate-game-registry.ts && tsc && npm run web:build
scripts.sunny:preview: npm run sunny:run -- --subject homework --preview free --node-access inspect-all
scripts.sunny:diag: npm run sunny:run -- --subject diag --session-mode diag --preview free --node-access inspect-all --child creator
scripts.sunny:demo:visual: npm run sunny:run -- --subject diag --session-mode diag --preview free --node-access inspect-all --voice muted --demo visual-explainer-map
scripts.sunny:homework:preview:dev: concurrently --names "server,web,kiosk" --prefix-colors "green,magenta,blue" "PORT=3001 TTS_ENABLED=true SUNNY_SUBJECT=homework npx tsx src/server.ts" "cd web && npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173" "sleep 3 && (open -na 'Google Chrome' --args --kiosk --noerrdialogs --disable-infobars --disable-session-crashed-bubble --disable-restore-session-state --autoplay-policy=no-user-gesture-required --app=http://localhost:5173 || chromium --kiosk --app=http://localhost:5173 || chromium-browser --kiosk --app=http://localhost:5173 || google-chrome --kiosk --app=http://localhost:5173)"
scripts.sunny:playtest:as-child: npm run sunny:run -- --subject homework --session-mode as-child --child ila
scripts.sunny:mode:intro: npm run sunny:ingest:companion && npm run sunny:run -- --session-mode intro --subject review
scripts.sunny:mode:onboarding:board: npm run sunny:run -- --subject onboarding --session-mode as-child --preview free --node-access inspect-all --voice muted
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:mute: npm run sunny:run -- --subject diag --session-mode diag --voice muted --child creator
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:companion: npm run sunny:run -- --subject diag --session-mode diag --child creator
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:homework: npm run sunny:run -- --subject homework --session-mode diag --preview free --child ila
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:homework:as-ila: npm run sunny:run -- --subject homework --session-mode as-child --child ila
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:homework:as-reina: npm run sunny:run -- --subject homework --session-mode as-child --child reina
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:homework:as-ila:unlocked: npm run sunny:run -- --subject homework --session-mode as-child --child ila --node-access inspect-all
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:homework:as-reina:unlock: npm run sunny:run -- --subject homework --session-mode as-child --child reina --node-access inspect-all
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:reading: npm run sunny:run -- --subject diag --session-mode diag --child creator
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:reading:as-ila: npm run sunny:run -- --subject reading --session-mode as-child --child ila
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:pronunciation: npm run sunny:run -- --subject diag --session-mode diag --child creator
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:pronunciation:as-ila: npm run sunny:run -- --subject pronunciation --session-mode as-child --child ila
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:math:as-ila: npm run sunny:run -- --subject math --session-mode as-child --child ila
scripts.test: vitest run && cd web && npm run test
scripts.test:system: vitest run && cd web && ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run src/tests/test-adventure-diag-fixes.tsx
scripts.dev:live: concurrently --names "server,web" --prefix-colors "green,magenta" "npx tsx src/server.ts" "cd web && npm run dev"
